race.description: Hully Foundations/ Crane Services Maiden Handicap
race.comment: VASILIAS (1) finished second last time out over 1210m at this track, making it two career minor placings. Has a solid record here with two top-three finishes to his name. Leading player. ALABAMA AWARD (3) has been in the placings at her last two starts, finishing second last time when she was prominent throughout here. Well placed and can play a major role. DRAGON FISH (5) has been about the money without winning, the latest offering a third over 1000m at this track. Expected to feature in the finish. LOVE SO SWEET (8) is knocking on the door, the latest effort a solid second here after being prominent at the turn. Finds the right race this time and can get the job done. MINATO (11) hasn't been as good in her last two but can turn things around here.
